post.summary: Add a user to a workspace
post.description: Requires owner or editor role. The new user will be assigned a role of viewer or editor (owner cannot be set via API).

put.description: Requires owner or editor role. Assignable roles are viewer and editor only.

UserIdQuery.name: user_id
UserIdQuery.description: Filter by user ID. Manager endpoint only.

StartDateQuery.name: start_date
StartDateQuery.description: Filter records from this session date onwards.

EndDateQuery.name: end_date
EndDateQuery.description: Filter records up to this session date. Must be after or equal to start_date.

PerPageQuery.name: per_page
PerPageQuery.description: Pagination page size. Allowed range is 1 to 100.
